automation_policy: Prepare, validate, package, upload, draft, and stage all grant materials without waiting for repeated instruction.
Do not bypass CAPTCHA, MFA, phone verification, or provider account controls.
Do not press a final legal external submission button without exact action-time confirmation for that specific application.
Do not store plaintext passwords, bank data, private keys, tokens, or tax files in grant packs or Drive uploads.
Keep current IFS competition sweep refreshed and reconciled to applications before every application session.
Use the unified corpus as the evidence base and exclude private finance by default.
